## 16. `L1_P17__relop_replace__0`

- **算子**: `relop_replace` (Category A)
- **描述**: Replace relational operators (<→<=, <=→<, >→>=, >=→>, ==→!=, !=→==) @ L26
- **变异行**: Line 26, 原始片段 `<`, 节点类型 `cuda_Lt`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Tile size for shared memory optimization
#define TILE_SIZE 32

__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, 
                              int M, int N, int K) {
    // Shared memory for tiles
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int row = blockIdx.y * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y;
    int col = blockIdx.x * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    // Loop over tiles
    for (int t = 0; t < (K + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++t) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < M && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x) < K) {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = A[row * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x];
        } else {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B (transposed)
        if (col < N && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y) < K) {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = B[col * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y];
        } else {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[threadIdx.y][k] * Bs[k][threadIdx.x];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < M && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int M = A.size(0);
    int K = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Configure kernel launch parameters
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, 
                 (M + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    // Launch kernel
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        M, N, K
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (M, K).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Tile size for shared memory optimization
#define TILE_SIZE 32

__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, 
                              int M, int N, int K) {
    // Shared memory for tiles
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int row = blockIdx.y * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y;
    int col = blockIdx.x * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    // Loop over tiles
    for (int t = 0; t <= (K + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++t) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < M && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x) < K) {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = A[row * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x];
        } else {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B (transposed)
        if (col < N && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y) < K) {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = B[col * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y];
        } else {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[threadIdx.y][k] * Bs[k][threadIdx.x];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < M && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int M = A.size(0);
    int K = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Configure kernel launch parameters
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, 
                 (M + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    // Launch kernel
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        M, N, K
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (M, K).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)
```

```python
#include <torch/extension.h>

// Tile size for shared memory optimization
#define TILE_SIZE 32

__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, 
                              int M, int N, int K) {

        } else {

        }

    }

    }
}

    // Get dimensions
    int M = A.size(0);
    int K = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);

                 (M + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);

        A.data_ptr<float>(),
```

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Tile size for shared memory optimization
#define TILE_SIZE 32

__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, 
                              int M, int N, int K) {
    // Shared memory for tiles
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int row = blockIdx.y * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y;
    int col = blockIdx.x * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    // Loop over tiles
    for (int t = 0; t < (K + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++t) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row <= M && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x) < K) {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = A[row * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x];
        } else {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B (transposed)
        if (col < N && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y) < K) {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = B[col * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y];
        } else {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[threadIdx.y][k] * Bs[k][threadIdx.x];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < M && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int M = A.size(0);
    int K = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Configure kernel launch parameters
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, 
                 (M + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    // Launch kernel
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        M, N, K
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """

        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:

        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (M, K).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
```

```
  - inputs[1]: shape=[2048, 4096], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.201, 5.036]
```

**Layer 1 值分布压力测试 (14 策略 × 3 种子 = 42 次) 详细结果：**

| 策略 | 种子数 | 结果 | 描述 |
|------|--------|------|------|
| boundary_last_element | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | last element set to extreme |
| structured_ramp | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | linearly increasing 0→N |
| large_magnitude | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | values ~1e6 |

| all_negative | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values < 0 |
| all_positive | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values > 0 |
| mixed_extremes | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | mix of 1e6 and 1e-6 |
| alternating_sign | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | [+big, -big, +big, ...] |
| sparse | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | 90% zeros, 10% random |
| uniform_constant | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all elements = same constant |
| head_heavy | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | first 10% large, rest small |
| tail_heavy | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | last 10% large, rest small |

## 18. `L1_P17__relop_replace__7`

- **算子**: `relop_replace` (Category A)
- **描述**: Replace relational operators (<→<=, <=→<, >→>=, >=→>, ==→!=, !=→==) @ L52
- **变异行**: Line 52, 原始片段 `<`, 节点类型 `cuda_Lt`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Tile size for shared memory optimization
#define TILE_SIZE 32

__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, 
                              int M, int N, int K) {
    // Shared memory for tiles
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int row = blockIdx.y * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y;
    int col = blockIdx.x * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    // Loop over tiles
    for (int t = 0; t < (K + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++t) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < M && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x) < K) {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = A[row * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x];
        } else {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B (transposed)
        if (col < N && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y) < K) {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = B[col * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y];
        } else {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[threadIdx.y][k] * Bs[k][threadIdx.x];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < M && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int M = A.size(0);
    int K = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Configure kernel launch parameters
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, 
                 (M + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    // Launch kernel
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        M, N, K
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (M, K).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Tile size for shared memory optimization
#define TILE_SIZE 32

__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, 
                              int M, int N, int K) {
    // Shared memory for tiles
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int row = blockIdx.y * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y;
    int col = blockIdx.x * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    // Loop over tiles
    for (int t = 0; t < (K + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++t) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < M && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x) < K) {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = A[row * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.x];
        } else {
            As[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B (transposed)
        if (col < N && (t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y) < K) {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = B[col * K + t * TILE_SIZE + threadIdx.y];
        } else {
            Bs[threadIdx.y][threadIdx.x] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[threadIdx.y][k] * Bs[k][threadIdx.x];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < M && col <= N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int M = A.size(0);
    int K = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Configure kernel launch parameters
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, 
                 (M + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    // Launch kernel
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        M, N, K
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (M, K).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)
```

## 19. `L1_P18__index_replace__14`

- **算子**: `index_replace` (Category B)
- **描述**: Swap Triton program_id axis or CUDA thread/block dimension index (e.g. program_id(0)→(1), threadIdx.x→threadIdx.y) @ L23
- **变异行**: Line 23, 原始片段 `blockDim.x`, 节点类型 `cuda_dim|y`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy < K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < K && idy < N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy < K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.y + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < K && idy < N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

## 20. `L1_P18__relop_replace__1`

- **算子**: `relop_replace` (Category A)
- **描述**: Replace relational operators (<→<=, <=→<, >→>=, >=→>, ==→!=, !=→==) @ L16
- **变异行**: Line 16, 原始片段 `<`, 节点类型 `cuda_Lt`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy < K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < K && idy < N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy <= K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < K && idy < N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 3: 未杀死该变异体的输入

**基础输入生成代码** (所有压力策略在此基础上仅修改值分布，shape 不变)：

```python
M = 1024
K = 4096
N = 2048

def get_inputs():
    A = torch.randn(K, M)
    B = torch.randn(N, K)
    return [A, B]
```

**初始 3 组输入的 Tensor 规格 (seed=42/43/44)：**

```
seed=42:
  - inputs[0]: shape=[4096, 1024], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-4.866, 5.105]
  - inputs[1]: shape=[2048, 4096], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.248, 5.185]
seed=43:
  - inputs[0]: shape=[4096, 1024], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.214, 4.774]
  - inputs[1]: shape=[2048, 4096], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.336, 5.138]
seed=44:
  - inputs[0]: shape=[4096, 1024], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.183, 5.439]
  - inputs[1]: shape=[2048, 4096], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.201, 5.036]
```

**Layer 1 值分布压力测试 (14 策略 × 3 种子 = 42 次) 详细结果：**

| 策略 | 种子数 | 结果 | 描述 |
|------|--------|------|------|
| boundary_last_element | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | last element set to extreme |
| structured_ramp | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | linearly increasing 0→N |
| large_magnitude | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | values ~1e6 |
| near_overflow | ×3 | REF_FAIL (参考实现崩溃) | values ~1e38 |
| near_zero | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | values ~1e-7 |
| denormals | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | values ~1e-40 (subnormal) |
| all_negative | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values < 0 |
| all_positive | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values > 0 |
| mixed_extremes | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | mix of 1e6 and 1e-6 |
| alternating_sign | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | [+big, -big, +big, ...] |
| sparse | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | 90% zeros, 10% random |
| uniform_constant | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all elements = same constant |
| head_heavy | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | first 10% large, rest small |
| tail_heavy | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | last 10% large, rest small |

**Layer 2 (dtype 切换)**: 未杀死
**Layer 3 (重复执行)**: 一致
**Layer 4 (训练模式)**: 未杀死
**原始 kernel 也失败的策略**: large_magnitude, mixed_extremes, alternating_sign, head_heavy, tail_heavy

---

## 21. `L1_P18__relop_replace__2`

- **算子**: `relop_replace` (Category A)
- **描述**: Replace relational operators (<→<=, <=→<, >→>=, >=→>, ==→!=, !=→==) @ L26
- **变异行**: Line 26, 原始片段 `<`, 节点类型 `cuda_Lt`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy < K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < K && idy < N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy < K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx <= K && idy < N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

## 22. `L1_P18__relop_replace__3`

- **算子**: `relop_replace` (Category A)
- **描述**: Replace relational operators (<→<=, <=→<, >→>=, >=→>, ==→!=, !=→==) @ L26
- **变异行**: Line 26, 原始片段 `<`, 节点类型 `cuda_Lt`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy < K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < K && idy < N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_optimized_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cublas_v2.h>

// Kernel for transposing matrix A (K, M) -> (M, K)
__global__ void transpose_A_kernel(const float* A, float* A_T, int K, int M) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < M && idy < K) {
        A_T[idx * K + idy] = A[idy * M + idx];
    }
}

// Kernel for transposing matrix B (N, K) -> (K, N)
__global__ void transpose_B_kernel(const float* B, float* B_T, int N, int K) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int idy = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    
    if (idx < K && idy <= N) {
        B_T[idx * N + idy] = B[idy * K + idx];
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    // Get dimensions
    int K = A.size(0);
    int M = A.size(1);
    int N = B.size(0);
    
    // Create output tensor
    auto C = torch::zeros({M, N}, A.options());
    
    // Create transposed versions
    auto A_T = torch::zeros({M, K}, A.options());
    auto B_T = torch::zeros({K, N}, B.options());
    
    // Transpose A (K, M) -> (M, K)
    dim3 blockDim1(16, 16);
    dim3 gridDim1((M + 15) / 16, (K + 15) / 16);
    transpose_A_kernel<<<gridDim1, blockDim1>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        A_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        K, M
    );
    
    // Transpose B (N, K) -> (K, N)
    dim3 gridDim2((K + 15) / 16, (N + 15) / 16);
    transpose_B_kernel<<<gridDim2, blockDim1>>>(
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        B_T.data_ptr<float>(),
        N, K
    );
    
    // Use cuBLAS for matrix multiplication: C = A_T * B_T
    cublasHandle_t handle;
    cublasCreate(&handle);
    
    const float alpha = 1.0f;
    const float beta = 0.0f;
    
    cublasSgemm(handle,
                CUBLAS_OP_N, CUBLAS_OP_N,
                N, M, K,  // Note: dimensions are swapped for column-major
                &alpha,
                B_T.data_ptr<float>(), N,
                A_T.data_ptr<float>(), K,
                &beta,
                C.data_ptr<float>(), N);
    
    cublasDestroy(handle);
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_optimized_cpp_source = """
torch::Tensor matmul_optimized_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_optimized = load_inline(
    name="matmul_optimized",
    cpp_sources=matmul_optimized_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_optimized_source,
    functions=["matmul_optimized_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_optimized = matmul_optimized
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication A.T * B.T
        
        Args:
            A: Input tensor of shape (K, M).
            B: Input tensor of shape (N, K).
            
        Returns:
            Output tensor of shape (M, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_optimized.matmul_optimized_cuda(A, B)
```

### Part 3: 未杀死该变异体的输入

**基础输入生成代码** (所有压力策略在此基础上仅修改值分布，shape 不变)：

```python
M = 1024
K = 4096
N = 2048

def get_inputs():
    A = torch.randn(K, M)
    B = torch.randn(N, K)
    return [A, B]
```

**初始 3 组输入的 Tensor 规格 (seed=42/43/44)：**

```
seed=42:
  - inputs[0]: shape=[4096, 1024], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-4.866, 5.105]
  - inputs[1]: shape=[2048, 4096], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.248, 5.185]
seed=43:
  - inputs[0]: shape=[4096, 1024], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.214, 4.774]
  - inputs[1]: shape=[2048, 4096], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.336, 5.138]
seed=44:
  - inputs[0]: shape=[4096, 1024], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.183, 5.439]
  - inputs[1]: shape=[2048, 4096], dtype=torch.float32, range=[-5.201, 5.036]
```

**Layer 1 值分布压力测试 (14 策略 × 3 种子 = 42 次) 详细结果：**

| 策略 | 种子数 | 结果 | 描述 |
|------|--------|------|------|
| boundary_last_element | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | last element set to extreme |
| structured_ramp | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | linearly increasing 0→N |
| large_magnitude | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | values ~1e6 |
| near_overflow | ×3 | REF_FAIL (参考实现崩溃) | values ~1e38 |
| near_zero | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | values ~1e-7 |
| denormals | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | values ~1e-40 (subnormal) |
| all_negative | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values < 0 |
| all_positive | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values > 0 |
| mixed_extremes | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | mix of 1e6 and 1e-6 |
| alternating_sign | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | [+big, -big, +big, ...] |
| sparse | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | 90% zeros, 10% random |
| uniform_constant | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all elements = same constant |
| head_heavy | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | first 10% large, rest small |
| tail_heavy | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | last 10% large, rest small |

**Layer 2 (dtype 切换)**: 未杀死
**Layer 3 (重复执行)**: 一致
**Layer 4 (训练模式)**: 未杀死
**原始 kernel 也失败的策略**: large_magnitude, mixed_extremes, alternating_sign, head_heavy, tail_heavy

## 23. `L1_P19__mask_boundary__0`

- **算子**: `mask_boundary` (Category B)
- **描述**: Weaken or tighten boundary checks in mask/tl.where (Triton) or thread/block guards (CUDA) @ L15
- **变异行**: Line 15, 原始片段 `idx < size`, 节点类型 `rhs-1`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define the custom CUDA kernel for ReLU
relu_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>

template<typename scalar_t>
__global__ void relu_kernel(const scalar_t* __restrict__ input, 
                           scalar_t* __restrict__ output, 
                           int64_t size) {
    int64_t idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    
    if (idx < size) {
        scalar_t val = input[idx];
        output[idx] = val > static_cast<scalar_t>(0) ? val : static_cast<scalar_t>(0);
    }
}

torch::Tensor relu_cuda(torch::Tensor input) {
    auto output = torch::empty_like(input);
    int64_t size = input.numel();
    
    const int block_size = 256;
    const int grid_size = (size + block_size - 1) / block_size;
    
    AT_DISPATCH_FLOATING_TYPES(input.scalar_type(), "relu_cuda", ([&] {
        relu_kernel<scalar_t><<<grid_size, block_size>>>(
            input.data_ptr<scalar_t>(),
            output.data_ptr<scalar_t>(),
            size
        );
    }));
    
    return output;
}
"""

relu_cpp_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>

torch::Tensor relu_cuda(torch::Tensor input);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code for ReLU
relu_extension = load_inline(
    name="relu_extension",
    cpp_sources=relu_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=relu_source,
    functions=["relu_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=[],
    with_cuda=True,
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model that performs ReLU activation using custom CUDA kernel.
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
    
    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Applies ReLU activation to the input tensor using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            x (torch.Tensor): Input tensor of any shape.
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output tensor with ReLU applied, same shape as input.
        """
        if x.is_cuda:
            return relu_extension.relu_cuda(x)
        else:
            # Fallback to PyTorch's implementation for CPU tensors
            return torch.relu(x)
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define the custom CUDA kernel for ReLU
relu_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>

template<typename scalar_t>
__global__ void relu_kernel(const scalar_t* __restrict__ input, 
                           scalar_t* __restrict__ output, 
                           int64_t size) {
    int64_t idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    
    if (idx < size - 1) {
        scalar_t val = input[idx];
        output[idx] = val > static_cast<scalar_t>(0) ? val : static_cast<scalar_t>(0);
    }
}

torch::Tensor relu_cuda(torch::Tensor input) {
    auto output = torch::empty_like(input);
    int64_t size = input.numel();
    
    const int block_size = 256;
    const int grid_size = (size + block_size - 1) / block_size;
    
    AT_DISPATCH_FLOATING_TYPES(input.scalar_type(), "relu_cuda", ([&] {
        relu_kernel<scalar_t><<<grid_size, block_size>>>(
            input.data_ptr<scalar_t>(),
            output.data_ptr<scalar_t>(),
            size
        );
    }));
    
    return output;
}
"""

relu_cpp_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>

torch::Tensor relu_cuda(torch::Tensor input);
"""

# Compile the inline CUDA code for ReLU
relu_extension = load_inline(
    name="relu_extension",
    cpp_sources=relu_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=relu_source,
    functions=["relu_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=[],
    with_cuda=True,
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model that performs ReLU activation using custom CUDA kernel.
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
    
    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Applies ReLU activation to the input tensor using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            x (torch.Tensor): Input tensor of any shape.
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output tensor with ReLU applied, same shape as input.
        """
        if x.is_cuda:
            return relu_extension.relu_cuda(x)
        else:
            # Fallback to PyTorch's implementation for CPU tensors
            return torch.relu(x)
```

## 24. `L1_P1__const_perturb__0`

- **算子**: `const_perturb` (Category A)
- **描述**: Perturb numeric literals (integer ±1; float ×1.01 or ×0.99) @ L108
- **变异行**: Line 108, 原始片段 `2048`, 节点类型 `const:int+1`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) < N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A (torch.Tensor): Input matrix A of shape (N, N).
            B (torch.Tensor): Input matrix B of shape (N, N).
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output matrix C of shape (N, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)

N = 2048

def get_inputs():
    A = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    B = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    return [A, B]

def get_init_inputs():
    return []
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) < N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A (torch.Tensor): Input matrix A of shape (N, N).
            B (torch.Tensor): Input matrix B of shape (N, N).
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output matrix C of shape (N, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)

N = 2049
```

## 25. `L1_P1__const_perturb__1`

- **算子**: `const_perturb` (Category A)
- **描述**: Perturb numeric literals (integer ±1; float ×1.01 or ×0.99) @ L108
- **变异行**: Line 108, 原始片段 `2048`, 节点类型 `const:int-1`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) < N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A (torch.Tensor): Input matrix A of shape (N, N).
            B (torch.Tensor): Input matrix B of shape (N, N).
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output matrix C of shape (N, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)

N = 2048

def get_inputs():
    A = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    B = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    return [A, B]

def get_init_inputs():
    return []
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) < N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

    """

        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A (torch.Tensor): Input matrix A of shape (N, N).
            B (torch.Tensor): Input matrix B of shape (N, N).
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output matrix C of shape (N, N).
        """

N = 2047

def get_inputs():

    B = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
```

```python
#include <torch/extension.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) < N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""
```

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) <= N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A (torch.Tensor): Input matrix A of shape (N, N).
            B (torch.Tensor): Input matrix B of shape (N, N).
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output matrix C of shape (N, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)

N = 2048

def get_inputs():
    A = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    B = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    return [A, B]

def get_init_inputs():
    return []
```

**原始 kernel 也失败的策略**: large_magnitude, mixed_extremes, alternating_sign, sparse, tail_heavy

## 27. `L1_P1__relop_replace__7`

- **算子**: `relop_replace` (Category A)
- **描述**: Replace relational operators (<→<=, <=→<, >→>=, >=→>, ==→!=, !=→==) @ L50
- **变异行**: Line 50, 原始片段 `<`, 节点类型 `cuda_Lt`

### Part 1: 未变异的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) < N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col < N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A (torch.Tensor): Input matrix A of shape (N, N).
            B (torch.Tensor): Input matrix B of shape (N, N).
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output matrix C of shape (N, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)

N = 2048

def get_inputs():
    A = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    B = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    return [A, B]

def get_init_inputs():
    return []
```

### Part 2: 变异后的完整源代码

```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernel for optimized matrix multiplication
matmul_source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Using shared memory for tile-based matrix multiplication
__global__ void matmul_kernel(const float* A, const float* B, float* C, int N) {
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    __shared__ float As[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    __shared__ float Bs[TILE_SIZE][TILE_SIZE];
    
    int bx = blockIdx.x, by = blockIdx.y;
    int tx = threadIdx.x, ty = threadIdx.y;
    
    int row = by * TILE_SIZE + ty;
    int col = bx * TILE_SIZE + tx;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    
    for (int tile = 0; tile < (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE; ++tile) {
        // Load tile from A
        if (row < N && (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx) < N) {
            As[ty][tx] = A[row * N + (tile * TILE_SIZE + tx)];
        } else {
            As[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Load tile from B
        if ((tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) < N && col < N) {
            Bs[ty][tx] = B[(tile * TILE_SIZE + ty) * N + col];
        } else {
            Bs[ty][tx] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
        
        // Compute partial sum
        for (int k = 0; k < TILE_SIZE; ++k) {
            sum += As[ty][k] * Bs[k][tx];
        }
        
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result
    if (row < N && col <= N) {
        C[row * N + col] = sum;
    }
}

torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B) {
    int N = A.size(0);
    auto C = torch::zeros({N, N}, A.options());
    
    const int TILE_SIZE = 32;
    dim3 blockDim(TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
    dim3 gridDim((N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE, (N + TILE_SIZE - 1) / TILE_SIZE);
    
    matmul_kernel<<<gridDim, blockDim>>>(
        A.data_ptr<float>(),
        B.data_ptr<float>(),
        C.data_ptr<float>(),
        N
    );
    
    return C;
}
"""

matmul_cpp_source = "torch::Tensor matmul_cuda(torch::Tensor A, torch::Tensor B);"

# Compile the inline CUDA code
matmul_cuda = load_inline(
    name="matmul_cuda",
    cpp_sources=matmul_cpp_source,
    cuda_sources=matmul_source,
    functions=["matmul_cuda"],
    verbose=False,
    extra_cflags=["-O3"],
    extra_ldflags=["-lcublas"],
)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    """
    Optimized model with custom CUDA kernel for matrix multiplication
    """
    def __init__(self):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.matmul_cuda = matmul_cuda
    
    def forward(self, A: torch.Tensor, B: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        """
        Performs optimized matrix multiplication using custom CUDA kernel.
        
        Args:
            A (torch.Tensor): Input matrix A of shape (N, N).
            B (torch.Tensor): Input matrix B of shape (N, N).
            
        Returns:
            torch.Tensor: Output matrix C of shape (N, N).
        """
        return self.matmul_cuda.matmul_cuda(A, B)

N = 2048

def get_inputs():
    A = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    B = torch.randn(N, N).cuda()
    return [A, B]

def get_init_inputs():
    return []
```

**Layer 1 值分布压力测试 (14 策略 × 3 种子 = 42 次) 详细结果：**

| 策略 | 种子数 | 结果 | 描述 |
|------|--------|------|------|
| boundary_last_element | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | last element set to extreme |
| structured_ramp | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | linearly increasing 0→N |
| large_magnitude | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | values ~1e6 |
| near_overflow | ×3 | REF_FAIL (参考实现崩溃) | values ~1e38 |
| near_zero | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | values ~1e-7 |
| denormals | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | values ~1e-40 (subnormal) |
| all_negative | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values < 0 |
| all_positive | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all values > 0 |
| mixed_extremes | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | mix of 1e6 and 1e-6 |
| alternating_sign | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | [+big, -big, +big, ...] |
| sparse | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | 90% zeros, 10% random |
| uniform_constant | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | all elements = same constant |
| head_heavy | ×3 | both_ok (未区分) | first 10% large, rest small |
| tail_heavy | ×3 | ORIG_ALSO_FAILS (原始也失败) | last 10% large, rest small |
